sections.paragraph:
- Original: παρατείνω

- Transliteration: Parateino

- Phonetic: par-at-i'-no

- Definition:

1. to extend beside, to stretch out lengthwise, to extend

2. to prolong

- Origin: from G3844 and teino (to stretch)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3844 and τείνω teinō (to stretch); to extend along that is prolong (in point of time): - continue.
